summary: CapyMatch P1 Mock Removal + Attention SSOT Audit Complete. All 12 backend tests PASSED. Frontend Pipeline page and Coach Mission Control verified working. P1 mock_data removal confirmed in events.py, intelligence.py, digest.py. Attention SSOT confirmed: GET /api/athlete/programs returns attention field with attentionScore, tier, urgency, momentum, primaryAction. Frontend PipelinePage.js consumes backend attention directly (no client-side recomputation).
critical_code_review_comments: services/attention.py: VERIFIED - New canonical attention service with compute_program_attention() returning attentionScore, tier, urgency, momentum, primaryAction, heroEligible, flags, etc.
event_engine.py: VERIFIED - Fully rewritten to load from db.events via init_event_engine(). No mock_data imports. Uses _load_events_from_db() and _load_schools_from_db().
routers/events.py: VERIFIED - No mock_data imports. Uses event_engine functions (get_events_list, get_schools_list, etc.).
routers/intelligence.py: VERIFIED - No mock_data imports. Uses _fetch_real_events_for_intel() which queries db.events directly.
routers/digest.py: VERIFIED - No mock_data imports. Uses db.events.find() directly for upcoming events.
routers/athlete_dashboard.py: VERIFIED - Line ~674-700: enriches programs with attention field from services/attention.py via compute_program_attention().
frontend/PipelinePage.js: VERIFIED - Line ~189-191: uses backend attention field directly (allAttention = allPrograms.filter(p => p.attention)...). No computeAllAttention() call.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Pipeline page loads, hero card shows, priority/kanban views work, coach mission control verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 mock removal and Attention SSOT verified. Events come from DB (3 events: Winter Showcase, College Exposure Camp, Spring Classic). Schools come from university_knowledge_base (1057+ schools). Attention field is computed by backend services/attention.py and returned in GET /api/athlete/programs. Frontend PipelinePage.js consumes attention directly without recomputation. Coach mission control shows journey_state and attention_status correctly.

backend_tests: test_events_endpoint_returns_real_events - PASS: Events from DB with proper structure
test_events_not_hardcoded_mock - PASS: Events have DB structure (IDs)
test_ai_briefing_no_mock_events - PASS: AI briefing endpoint works
test_programs_have_attention_field - PASS: Programs have attention field from backend
test_attention_field_structure - PASS: Attention has attentionScore, tier, urgency, momentum, primaryAction
test_attention_tier_values - PASS: All tiers are valid (high/medium/low)
test_attention_urgency_values - PASS: All urgencies are valid (critical/soon/monitor)
test_attention_determinism - PASS: Attention data identical across consecutive calls
test_mission_control_determinism - PASS: Mission control returns identical data
test_coach_mission_control_structure - PASS: Coach mission control has expected structure
frontend_tests: Pipeline page loads - PASS: recruiting-board, pipeline-header, view-toggle found
Priority view - PASS: Hero card shows 'TOP PRIORITY - Review this school', attention-sorted list visible
Kanban view - PASS: Columns (Added, Outreach, Talking, Visit, Offered) with school cards
Coach mission control - PASS: Shows athletes, events from DB, attention status (CRITICAL, Worsening, Improving)

P1_mock_removal.events.py: No mock_data imports - uses event_engine functions
P1_mock_removal.event_engine.py: Fully rewritten - loads from db.events and db.university_knowledge_base

attention_SSOT.athlete_dashboard: GET /api/athlete/programs enriches programs with attention field
attention_SSOT.frontend_consumption: PipelinePage.js reads p.attention directly, no recomputation
